decisions.decision: v1.21.1 milestone goal: YAML workflows.yaml drives runtime summary/status/health
decisions.rationale: v1.21 built WorkflowFunnelLoader but never wired it into runtime — YAML was design asset not runtime fact

next_action: Continue /gsd-new-milestone v1.21.1 to complete requirements + roadmap phases
context_notes: v1.21 milestone complete and merged (PR #369, 2026-04-19). v1.21.1 goal established: make YAML the runtime fact source for funnel stats. Memory files updated. /gsd-new-milestone workflow was started but not completed — still needs requirements + roadmap.
